targets.expr: avg(histogram_quantile($quantile, sum by(le, pattern, host) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job="$job"}[$__rate_interval])))) by (pattern)
avg(histogram_quantile($quantile, sum by(le, method, host) (rate(maxbot_requests_duration_seconds{job="$job"}[$__rate_interval])))) by (method)
avg(histogram_quantile($quantile, sum(irate(redis_pool_action_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, action, name))) by (action, name)
avg(histogram_quantile($quantile, sum(irate(redis_single_commands_bucket{job=~"$job", command != "ping"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, host, command, error, name))) by (command, error, name)
